subcodes.first_line: We beseech the unseen confirmations for Jinab-i-Mu'allim, that at all times in the garden of divine unity, he may, even as the nightingale [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب معلم از تاییدات غیبیه میطلبیم که در کل احیان در گلشن توحید چون عندلیب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
